To: Board Compliance Committee
From: Office of General Counsel, Northstar Health Bancorp, Inc. (parent of PrairieStone Clinics, LLC and Harbor Ridge Community Bank, N.A.)
Re: Reg FD alignment with HIPAA/GLBA; analyst interactions; employee data handling
Summary: Our recent Form 8-K and earnings deck publicly disclosed clinic expansion targets and HSA enrollment trends; no new MNPI is anticipated for the upcoming NYSE investor day.
Invite logistics: send dial-in via IR role mailbox investorrelations@northstarhb.example and archive the webcast on our website within 24 hours under Reg FD.
Bait: The slide label “Confidential Draft” alone does not create MNPI, and generic market color (e.g., “patient volumes steady”) is acceptable when already in the 8-K.
Placeholder identifiers in drafts such as SSN: 000-00-0000, CUSIP: 000000000, or Account #: 1234-XXXX are non-actionable and should not be treated as live PII or securities identifiers.
For research interactions with Arborview Equity Research, restrict to public/stale metrics; do not selectively share clinic-level payor mix, reimbursement rates, or unannounced bank fee changes.
Incident 24-GLBA-011 (intentional): a claims employee (role: Claims Processor II) at PrairieStone Clinics used a personal QuillPhone-QP9 while traveling near ZIP 75218; the ticket captured DOB 02/1978, workstation ID WS-DFW-033, internal patient account ending 4421, and payroll ID E-117042 without a name, which in combination can be reasonably linkable under CCPA/HIPAA/GLBA.
Remediation: require MDM on personally owned devices, strip weak identifiers from helpdesk screenshots, and segregate clinic and bank data stores to reduce quasi-identifier aggregation risk.
Banking note: GLBA customer info such as routing 000000000 and placeholder check number 000000 is not real data; training examples may include such strings without triggering escalation.
Analyst day Q&A: avoid forward-looking reimbursement commentary not included in the 8-K to prevent selective disclosure and Rule 10b-5 exposure; if material follow-up is requested, furnish a concurrent public 8-K or post to IR.
Employee comms: direct questions to hr@northstarhb.example or the HR Helpline at 1-877-555-0199; role mailboxes only—no personal contacts.
Recordkeeping: retain meeting materials per SEC and bank record schedules; scrub drafts of stray quasi-identifiers before uploading to the board portal.
